scripts.copy-webui: mkdir -p public/webui && cp ../webui/index.html ../webui/ui.js ../webui/ui.css ../webui/host-iface.js ../webui/groove-math.js ../webui/smf-writer.js ../webui/dump-mode.js ../webui/mock-host.js ../webui/wasm-host.js ../webui/plugin-host.js public/webui/ && (cp ../webui/poly_engine.js ../webui/poly_engine.wasm public/webui/ 2>/dev/null || true)
scripts.dev: npm run generate-presets && npm run generate-counts && npm run generate-params && astro dev
scripts.start: npm run generate-presets && npm run generate-counts && npm run generate-params && astro dev
scripts.build: npm run generate-presets && npm run generate-counts && npm run generate-params && npm run copy-webui && astro build
